name: note-refactor
description: Discover hidden connections between notes, suggest wiki-links, identify themes, and refactor your knowledge graph.
author: Claude (Claudian)
examples: /note-refactor discover - 发现潜在的笔记关联
/note-refactor suggest-links - 为当前笔记建议添加链接
/note-refactor merge-similar - 合并相似主题的笔记
/note-refactor split-note - 将大笔记拆分成多个小主题
